title: Fletching Additions
body:
# Fletching Additions Gives the fletching table functionality!
### What does this mod do? Currently this mod just adds basic functionality to the fletching table. ### Screenshots below: ![Fletching Table GUI](https://github.com/FrostBird347/Fletching-Additions/blob/master/media/Crafting.png?raw=true)
(refer to the screenshot above for the correct number of arrows outputted)
